title: Shuttle Art 720 Pack Crayons Bulk Set, 18 Assorted Colours, Non toxic Colouring Crayons for Kids Toddlers, Wax Crayons for 3+, Teacher-Quality Paint Sticks for Children, Family Class Party Supplies
features: 720 CLASS PACK CRAYONS: This set includes 720 Crayons in 18 assorted colours. Each wax crayon is arranged by color within an organized storage box, making it easy to find and use. With high-quality materials, these crayons have vibrant colours that can get kids interested in both drawing and art crafting
BULK CRAYON VALUE SET: With an organized storage box and a total of 720 teacher-quality paint sticks, It meets all your needs of teaching, organizing school activities or an art activity at home

Premium Quality Crayons: The crayons come pre-sharpened and wrapped to keep little hands mess-free. Beyond their use for drawing ,coloring and crafts, they can be melted down and easily shaped into whatever form you desire with a mold

SAFE & DURABLE: Conforms to U.S. ASTM D-4236 and EN71 standards, our colouring crayons are non-toxic and acid-free, ensuring safety for children of all ages. Vibrant colors, smooth gliding, and resistance to breaking the set has can be the best choice for worry-free creativity
